name: Steam Games
description: Owned games with playtime statistics and recently played games

owned.description: All games owned by the user, sorted by playtime descending

playtimeHours.description: Total playtime in hours (rounded to 1 decimal)

playtimeTwoWeeksMinutes.description: Playtime in the last two weeks in minutes

iconUrl.description: URL to the game's icon image

lastPlayed.description: When the game was last played

recentlyPlayed.description: Games played in the last two weeks

playtimeTwoWeeksMinutes.description: Playtime in last two weeks in minutes
